meta.description: Biblioteca de imágenes para actividades imagequestion — práctica de inglés A1-B2
meta.source: Unsplash (unsplash.com) — libres de uso comercial y educativo.
meta.how_to_use: Copia el campo 'url' de cualquier imagen en el campo 'image:' de tu actividad imagequestion en el DSL.
meta.how_to_update: Para agregar imágenes: abre unsplash.com, busca la foto que quieres, copia la URL directa de la imagen (clic derecho → Copiar dirección de imagen) y agrégala siguiendo el mismo formato JSON.

images.name: Morning Alarm Clock
images.description: A ringing alarm clock on a bedside table — time to wake up
questions: What time does the alarm say?
What do you do after the alarm rings?
Describe what you see in the picture.

images.name: Morning Coffee
images.description: A person enjoying a cup of coffee with latte art in the morning light
questions: What is the person drinking?
Do you drink coffee in the morning? Why or why not?
What other things do people have for breakfast?

images.name: Cooking Breakfast
images.description: A person cooking food in a bright, modern kitchen
questions: What is the person doing?
What can you see in the kitchen?
What do you usually eat for breakfast?

images.name: Commuting to Work
images.description: Busy people walking to work in a crowded city street
questions: Where are these people going?
How do you get to school or work?
Describe the scene in the picture.

images.name: Working at a Computer
images.description: A person typing on a laptop computer at a desk with a coffee cup nearby
questions: What is the person doing?
Do you use a computer every day? What for?
Describe the workspace in the picture.
